note: Edit this file when the pipeline code changes. run_log_key matches keys in pipeline_run_log.json (stream_dates). pipeline_status: ok/partial/gap/no_source. agent_status: uses/partial/none.

streams.name: Meesho Orders
streams.agent_fields: GMV, orders, SKU performance, state distribution, return rates

streams.name: Meesho Returns
streams.agent_fields: Return rate per SKU, return reason breakdown

streams.name: Meesho Ads
streams.reason_gap: Handlers for ME_ADS_SUMMARY, ME_ADS_CATALOG, ME_ADS_MASTER are built and save to rumee_db_me_ads.csv, but the extension ME Ads job is not yet complete — no files are arriving in Drive. Until the extension sends data, only the monthly total from the Payments sheet is available.
streams.agent_reason_gap: Agent sees spend totals only until ME Ads extension job is live. Once files arrive, per-campaign ROAS and catalog-level spend will be available.

streams.name: Meesho Views
streams.agent_reason_gap: Daily views + orders are stored in the DB but the insights engine has no trend analysis module for them. Useful for measuring impact of listing or pricing changes on traffic.

streams.name: Meesho Claims
streams.agent_reason_gap: Deadline alerts exist but no claim success rate, recovery amount trends, or issue-type analysis. Agent cannot advise on how to improve claim acceptance.

streams.name: Meesho Catalog
streams.reason_gap: Handler runs and reads stock counts from the file, but the stock data is NOT written to any DB table — only the processed date is saved. Stock levels are lost after each run.
streams.agent_reason_gap: No stock data in DB. Agent cannot correlate stockouts with sales dips or flag low-stock risk. Separate analysis needed to design how catalog data feeds into insights.

streams.name: Flipkart Payments
streams.agent_fields: Settlement, SKU revenue, reverse shipping cost, zone distribution

streams.name: Flipkart Orders
streams.agent_fields: date, orders, quantity (daily); date, sku, orders, quantity (per-SKU)
streams.agent_reason_gap: fk_orders_daily and fk_orders_sku are in rumee_db_daily.csv — not yet wired into context_builder.py or brief_builder.py. Vantage cannot see daily order counts yet.

streams.name: Flipkart Returns
streams.reason_gap: Only total returns count extracted. No return reason breakdown (quality, wrong item, size issue). File is downloaded but item-level data is unused.
streams.agent_reason_gap: Agent has return counts but no reason codes. Cannot compare return patterns across FK and Meesho or advise on specific defect types.

streams.name: Flipkart Keywords
streams.agent_fields: Search term performance, conversion by keyword

streams.name: Flipkart Ads (7 types)
streams.extension_job: fk_ads_daily / fk_ads_fsn / fk_ads_placements / fk_ads_overall / fk_ads_search / fk_ads_orders / fk_ads_kw
streams.agent_fields: Per-campaign daily spend, per-SKU ROAS, keyword spend/clicks, placement breakdown, search queries
streams.agent_reason_gap: All 7 report types are parsed and stored in rumee_db_fk_ads.csv. Vantage insights engine has not yet been built to read these tables — agent still only sees fk_monthly totals.

streams.name: Flipkart Claims
streams.agent_reason_gap: Claims data stored in DB but no insights built on it. Agent cannot report on claim success rate, recovery totals, or flag auto-claim patterns.

streams.name: Flipkart Listings
db_tables: fk_pairs (OG vs Bahubali pricing pairs, in rumee_db_summary.csv)
streams.agent_reason_gap: Listing file is parsed and OG/Bahubali pricing pairs stored in fk_pairs table. No Vantage insights built on this data yet — agent cannot flag pricing anomalies or track delisting.

streams.name: Amazon (all types)
streams.reason_gap: No extension generates Amazon data. Seller Central exports must be done manually. DB schema for az_monthly is ready but has no rows.
streams.agent_reason_gap: No Amazon data available. Agent cannot include Amazon in multi-platform analysis.
